title: selago viscosa
intro: Selago viscosa, also known as sticky selaginella, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selago viscosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in natural health practices.
